Class ShelterApplicationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.application.impl.ShelterApplicationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ShelterApplicationService
public class ShelterApplicationServiceImpl extends Object implements ShelterApplicationService
Default implementation of ShelterApplicationService that orchestrates shelter registration, updates, removal, and listing across the service layer. Every mutating operation records an audit entry via AuditService.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Constructs a ShelterApplicationServiceImpl with the required service dependencies.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShelterApplicationServiceImpl

      public ShelterApplicationServiceImpl(ShelterService shelterService, AuditService<Shelter> auditService)
      Constructs a ShelterApplicationServiceImpl with the required service dependencies. Both services are mandatory; neither may be null.
      Parameters:
      shelterService - the service used to persist and retrieve shelter records; must not be null
      auditService - the service used to record audit log entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either argument is null

  • Method Details

    • registerShelter

      public Shelter registerShelter(String name, String location, int capacity)
      Registers a new shelter with the given name, location, and capacity. Throws an exception if a shelter with the same name and location already exists. Constructs a new Shelter and delegates registration to ShelterService.
      Specified by:
      registerShelter in interface ShelterApplicationService
      Parameters:
      name - the shelter name; must not be null or blank
      location - the shelter location; must not be null or blank
      capacity - the maximum number of animals the shelter can hold; must be positive
      Returns:
      the newly created Shelter

    • listShelters

      public List<Shelter> listShelters()
      Returns a list of all registered shelters in the system. Returns an empty list if no shelters have been registered.
      Specified by:
      listShelters in interface ShelterApplicationService
      Returns:
      a list of all shelters

    • updateShelter

      public Shelter updateShelter(String shelterId, String name, String location, Integer capacity)
      Updates an existing shelter's information with the provided values. Only non-null parameters are applied; omitted (null) fields retain their current values. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found. Fetches the current shelter, applies only the non-null fields, then persists the update.
      Specified by:
      updateShelter in interface ShelterApplicationService
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to update; must not be null or blank
      name - the new name, or null to keep the current value
      location - the new location, or null to keep the current value
      capacity - the new capacity, or null to keep the current value
      Returns:
      the updated Shelter

    • removeShelter

      public void removeShelter(String shelterId)
      Removes a shelter from the system by ID. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found, still holds animals, or has pending transfer requests. Throws if the shelter still holds animals or does not exist.
      Specified by:
      removeShelter in interface ShelterApplicationService
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to remove; must not be null or blank
